---
title: "The Future of Strategy"
short-title: "Future"
author: "Raban Heller"
date-modified: today
abstract: "Open problems, frontier research, and a reading list for what comes next."
keywords: ["future", "open problems", "frontier research", "reading list"]
---

# The Future of Strategy {#sec-future}

::: {.callout-note}
This chapter is under development.
:::
